title: Preparing Gels

steps: Transfer 2g agarose and 100mL 1X TAE to a 250mL Erlenmeyer flask. Swirl gently to mix

Place flask in microwave for 30 seconds . Use hot hands gripper to remove flask and swirl gently. Place back in microwave for 30 seconds . Watch for boiling and remove flask using hot hands gripper once bubbles are large and solution is clear. *Do not let the liquid boil over!!*
Allow solution to cool on the bench until steam is no longer visible and flask can be held indefinitely without the hot hands gripper
Transfer 10µL 10,000X SYBR safe to the flask. Swirl gently to mix, and try not to introduce bubbles
Pour gel solution into the gel box, place combs, and cover the gel. Allow to cool for ~25 minutes
Prepare the gel to run by submerging in enough 1X TAE to cover the gel
creator: Jordan Sims
